steps.title: Read the slope of line k directly
steps.content: Line $k$ is $y = \frac{1}{4}x + 1$. In slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$, the slope is $m = \frac{1}{4}$.

steps.title: Parallel lines share the same slope
steps.content: Parallel lines have equal slopes. Line $j$ is parallel to line $k$, so the slope of $j$ is also $\frac{1}{4} = 0.25$. That matches the answer — 0.25 is correct.
